compiled_state.title: As a skill maintainer, I can reference reviewer prompts from a single shared location
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Move agent-clarity.md, scope.md, and value.md to a single shared directory and update all references in /brainstorm and /roadmap SKILL.md files
**Why**: These 3 files are currently duplicated across brainstorm/docs/reviewers/ and roadmap/docs/reviewers/, creating maintenance drift risk
**Scope**:
- IN: Move files to shared location; update both skills' path references; delete duplicates; add shared path to review-gate-allowlist.conf if needed
- OUT: Changing the content of reviewer prompts (move only)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, reviewer prompt files exist in exactly one shared directory with no copies in brainstorm/docs/reviewers/ or roadmap/docs/reviewers/
  ← Satisfies: "Reviewer prompt files exist in a single shared location with no duplicated copies"
- When this story is complete, both /brainstorm and /roadmap can resolve the shared reviewer path without error
  ← Satisfies: "Reviewer prompt files exist in a single shared location"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic
  ← Satisfies: TDD DoD

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Shared path must be added to review-gate-allowlist.conf if not already covered
- [Testing] Path migration must update all references atomically — partial update leaves one skill broken
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Story complete: reviewer prompts consolidated to shared location
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
